title: Azure Kubernetes Service Managed Cluster
description: An AKS managed cluster represents a Kubernetes cluster in Azure Kubernetes Service. It defines the cluster configuration including Kubernetes version, node pools, networking, identity, and add-on profiles. AKS manages the Kubernetes control plane while customers manage the worker nodes.

name.description: The name of the managed cluster resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives.

name.description: The name of the managed cluster SKU.

tier.description: The pricing tier. Free provides no SLA, Standard provides 99.95% uptime SLA, Premium provides 99.99%.

identity.description: The identity of the managed cluster.

powerState.description: The power state of the cluster.

kubernetesVersion.description: The version of Kubernetes to deploy. When not specified, the default version is used.

currentKubernetesVersion.description: The version of Kubernetes the managed cluster is running.

dnsPrefix.description: The DNS prefix specified when creating the managed cluster.

fqdn.description: The FQDN of the master pool.

agentPoolProfiles.description: The agent pool profiles for the managed cluster.

enableRBAC.description: Whether to enable Kubernetes Role-Based Access Control.

nodeResourceGroup.description: The name of the resource group containing agent pool nodes.

apiServerAccessProfile.description: Access profile for managed cluster API server.

authorizedIPRanges.description: IP ranges authorized to access the Kubernetes API server.

enablePrivateCluster.description: Whether to create the cluster as a private cluster.

AgentPoolProfile.description: Profile for the container service agent pool.

name.description: Unique name of the agent pool profile.

count.description: Number of agents (VMs) to host docker containers.

vmSize.description: The size of the agent VMs.

mode.description: The mode of an agent pool. System pools serve control plane components, User pools serve workloads.

maxPods.description: The maximum number of pods that can run on a node.

minCount.description: The minimum number of nodes for auto-scaling.

maxCount.description: The maximum number of nodes for auto-scaling.

availabilityZones.description: The list of availability zones to use for nodes.

nodeLabels.description: The node labels to persist across all nodes.

nodeTaints.description: The taints added to new nodes.

networkPlugin.description: Network plugin used for building the Kubernetes network.

networkPolicy.description: Network policy used for building the Kubernetes network.

podCidr.description: A CIDR notation IP range from which to assign pod IPs.

serviceCidr.description: A CIDR notation IP range from which to assign service cluster IPs.

dnsServiceIP.description: An IP address assigned to the Kubernetes DNS service.

AADProfile.description: Azure Active Directory profile for the managed cluster.

enableAzureRBAC.description: Whether to enable Azure RBAC for Kubernetes authorization.

adminGroupObjectIDs.description: The list of AAD group object IDs that will have admin role of the cluster.

tenantID.description: The AAD tenant ID to use for authentication.
